Support this Event

**Please note, a gift to an event does not register you for an event.**

Event Budget

Important Information



ADDITIONAL SECURITY FORMS REQUIRED

Your registration will not be complete until you fill out an additional security form. Click here to fill out the form. After you completed and submitted, download the form using the button on the Thank You page. Sign the documents then upload them by clicking here.


NO watches. NO holes and/or tears. NO shorts. NO click pens. Pens must be clear.

events.title: Bonham, TX DOC
events.summary: We trained 65 Teammates including 12 Rookies on Friday night and they went behind the walls on Saturday where they had 405 Gospel conversations. 64 inmates began relationships with Jesus and another 150 repented and returned to Him! We were also able to train 165 to share the Good News.

events.title: Houston, TX DOC
events.summary: We have spots for 60 men and 40 women to take the Good News behind the walls of a county jail. Your registration will not be finalized until you complete the additional security steps. More information on the Event Info page.

location.venueName: No open-toed shoes or sandals. No expensive or attention-grabbing shoes. No skin-tight, revealing, and/or see-through clothing. No clothing displaying gang affiliation, obscene language or drawings, drug or alcohol paraphernalia. No dew-rags/skull caps other than those which serve a religious purpose. no cologne or perfume. NO ORANGE CLOTHING. Full-length pants are required. No shorts, capris, or gym attire. No ripped pants. No leggings, tights, or spandex. Dresses and skirts must be floor length w/o slits. Shirts must have sleeves that are no shorter than halfway down the upper arm. Bra straps must be fully covered at all times. No large arm-holes that expose the chest. Volunteers will not wear any jewelry other than an inexpensive watch, and/or wedding band and/or a medical alert bracelet. No smart watches. Non-retractable pens only (1 per volunteer).
